name: Maca Lepidium meyenii
summary: Maca centers on the root; hypocotyl.
description: Maca centers on the root; hypocotyl. Key reported compounds include macamides; macaenes; glucosinolates.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Medicinal effects of Peruvian maca (Lepidium meyenii): a review
sources.authors: da Silva Leitão Peres N  et al.

sources.title: Exploring the chemical and pharmacological variability of Lepidium meyenii: a comprehensive review of the effects of maca
sources.authors: Ulloa Del Carpio N et al.

sources.title: Not All Maca Is Created Equal: A Review of Colors, Nutrition, Phytochemicals, and Clinical Uses
